list.name: alpha_lab_strategy
list.label: Strategy
list.query: SELECT strategy_name AS __text, strategy_name AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_universe_profiles UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_backtest_runs) strategies ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT strategy_name AS __text, strategy_name AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_universe_profiles UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles UNION SELECT DISTINCT strategy_name FROM strategy_backtest_runs) strategies ORDER BY 1

list.name: alpha_lab_exchange
list.label: Exchange
list.query: SELECT '__all' AS __text, '__all' AS __value UNION SELECT exchange AS __text, exchange AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT exchange FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}') exchanges ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT '__all' AS __text, '__all' AS __value UNION SELECT exchange AS __text, exchange AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT exchange FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}') exchanges ORDER BY 1

list.name: alpha_lab_stage
list.label: Portfolio Stage
list.query: SELECT '__all' AS __text, '__all' AS __value UNION SELECT stage AS __text, stage AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT stage FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}') stages ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT '__all' AS __text, '__all' AS __value UNION SELECT stage AS __text, stage AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT stage FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}') stages ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(run_at) AS run_at FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') AND $__timeFilter(run_at)) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(candidate_symbols), 0) AS value FROM strategy_universe_profiles u JOIN latest l ON u.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR u.exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}')

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(run_at) AS run_at FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') AND $__timeFilter(run_at)) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(selected_symbols), 0) AS value FROM strategy_universe_profiles u JOIN latest l ON u.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR u.exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}')

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(run_at) AS run_at FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') AND $__timeFilter(run_at)) SELECT ROUND(COALESCE((SUM(accepted_entries)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(candidate_entries), 0)) * 100, 0), 2) AS value FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles p JOIN latest l ON p.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR p.stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}')

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(run_at) AS run_at FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') AND $__timeFilter(run_at)) SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(MAX((max_concurrent_positions::double precision / NULLIF(policy_max_concurrent_positions, 0)) * 100), 0), 2) AS value FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles p JOIN latest l ON p.run_at = l.run_at WHERE strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR p.stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}')

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX(candidate_symbols) AS "Candidate Scan" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX(selected_symbols) AS "Selected Universe" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(selected_avg_tradable_ratio) * 100 AS "Selected Tradable %" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(selected_observed_execution_share) * 100 AS "Selected Observed %" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", ROUND(AVG((selected_symbols::double precision / NULLIF(candidate_symbols, 0)) * 100), 2) AS "Selection Rate %" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(candidate_avg_spread_bps) AS "Candidate Avg Spread" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(selected_avg_spread_bps) AS "Selected Avg Spread" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(candidate_median_spread_bps) AS "Candidate Median Spread" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(selected_median_spread_bps) AS "Selected Median Spread" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(candidate_avg_depth_usd) AS "Candidate Depth" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(selected_avg_depth_usd) AS "Selected Depth" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(candidate_avg_volume_usd) AS "Candidate Volume" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(selected_avg_volume_usd) AS "Selected Volume" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(deep_liquidity_symbols) AS "Deep" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(core_liquidity_symbols) AS "Core" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(tradable_liquidity_symbols) AS "Tradable" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(fragile_liquidity_symbols) AS "Fragile" FROM strategy_universe_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", AVG(avg_capacity_utilization) * 100 AS "Avg Slot Usage %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX((max_concurrent_positions::double precision / NULLIF(policy_max_concurrent_positions, 0)) * 100) AS "Peak Slot Usage %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX((max_abs_net_exposure_fraction / NULLIF(policy_max_net_exposure_fraction, 0)) * 100) AS "Peak Net Budget %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX((max_abs_beta_btc / NULLIF(policy_max_abs_beta_btc, 0)) * 100) AS "BTC Beta Budget %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", MAX((max_abs_beta_eth / NULLIF(policy_max_abs_beta_eth, 0)) * 100) AS "ETH Beta Budget %" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(candidate_entries) AS "Candidates" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(accepted_entries) AS "Accepted" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(rejected_gross_limit) AS "Rejected Gross" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(rejected_net_limit) AS "Rejected Net" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(rejected_beta_limit) AS "Rejected Beta" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', run_at) AS "time", SUM(rejected_open_symbol) AS "Rejected Open Symbol" FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at) AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}' AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  run_at,
  exchange,
  candidate_symbols,
  selected_symbols,
  ROUND((selected_avg_tradable_ratio * 100)::numeric, 2) AS selected_tradable_pct,
  ROUND((selected_observed_execution_share * 100)::numeric, 2) AS selected_observed_pct,
  ROUND(selected_median_spread_bps::numeric, 2) AS selected_median_spread_bps,
  array_to_string(ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(metadata -> 'selected_universe')), ', ') AS selected_universe,
  array_to_string(ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(metadata -> 'top_candidates')), ', ') AS top_candidates
FROM strategy_universe_profiles
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}'
  AND ('${alpha_lab_exchange}' = '__all' OR exchange = '${alpha_lab_exchange}')
ORDER BY run_at DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
  run_at,
  stage,
  timeframe,
  policy_max_concurrent_positions,
  max_concurrent_positions AS peak_positions,
  ROUND((avg_capacity_utilization * 100)::numeric, 2) AS avg_capacity_pct,
  ROUND((max_capacity_utilization * 100)::numeric, 2) AS peak_capacity_pct,
  ROUND((policy_max_net_exposure_fraction * 100)::numeric, 2) AS policy_net_pct,
  ROUND((max_abs_net_exposure_fraction * 100)::numeric, 2) AS peak_net_pct,
  ROUND(policy_max_abs_beta_btc::numeric, 3) AS policy_beta_btc,
  ROUND(max_abs_beta_btc::numeric, 3) AS peak_beta_btc,
  ROUND(policy_max_abs_beta_eth::numeric, 3) AS policy_beta_eth,
  ROUND(max_abs_beta_eth::numeric, 3) AS peak_beta_eth,
  candidate_entries,
  accepted_entries,
  rejected_open_symbol,
  rejected_gross_limit,
  rejected_long_limit,
  rejected_short_limit,
  rejected_net_limit,
  rejected_beta_limit
FROM strategy_portfolio_profiles
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}'
  AND ('${alpha_lab_stage}' = '__all' OR stage = '${alpha_lab_stage}')
ORDER BY run_at DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT
  run_at,
  strategy_name,
  timeframe,
  symbol,
  trades,
  ROUND((win_rate * 100)::numeric, 2) AS win_rate_pct,
  ROUND(net_return_pct::numeric, 2) AS net_return_pct,
  ROUND(avg_edge_after_cost_bps::numeric, 2) AS edge_after_cost_bps,
  ROUND(avg_total_cost_bps::numeric, 2) AS total_cost_bps,
  ROUND((avg_fill_ratio * 100)::numeric, 2) AS fill_ratio_pct,
  ROUND(max_drawdown_pct::numeric, 2) AS max_drawdown_pct,
  ROUND(sharpe::numeric, 3) AS sharpe
FROM strategy_backtest_runs
WHERE $__timeFilter(run_at)
  AND strategy_name = '${alpha_lab_strategy}'
ORDER BY run_at DESC, net_return_pct DESC
LIMIT 100
